composition.truck_orientation: angled into the frame from left to right
composition.important_crop_information: roof is completely visible; lower bumper corners slightly cropped; right side (from viewer) of trailer cropped by photo edge

company_identity.appearance: large white letters on black background

company_identity.position: inside windshield, lower left from viewer, horizontal
company_identity.appearance: black on white, block style paper/plastic sign

company_identity.position: inside windshield, lower right from viewer, horizontal
company_identity.appearance: black on white, block style paper/plastic sign
large white letters on black grille element

owner_signatures.position: inside windshield, between KOŁO and KAMIL, handwritten script, white on transparent background

roof_lights.position: roof, in front of roof spoiler, horizontal row

bumper_lights.position: integrated into lower bumper, one left, one right

main_headlights.position: lower corners of cab, integrated into bodywork

front_geometry.grille_description: four thick horizontal white bars with slightly curved ends and black background elements, DAF logo on central thick bar
front_geometry.headlight_description: two-part headlight assemblies (main & indicator), clear lens, trapezoidal with inner geometric divisions, lower corners
front_geometry.bumper_description: large integrated white bumper, two small rectangular lights (left/right), fits flush to lower grille
